headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.

raw.headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 Facing Challenges

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Baker Hughes, Raises Price Target to $77
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Marc Bianchi   maintains Baker Hughes (NASDAQ:BKR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $75 to $77.
